title: Stracciatella Gelato with a Citrus Twist
description: A creative Italian dessert featuring the sweetness of stracciatella, the tanginess of citrus, and a hint of fermentation.
instructions: Combine milk and sugar in a saucepan, heat until the sugar dissolves.
Remove from heat and stir in lemon zest and orange juice.
Let it cool, then refrigerate overnight.
Blend the mixture with stracciatella gelato and citrusy marmalade.
If desired, add fermented cream for extra depth.
Freeze the mixture for at least 2 hours.
Optional: top with additional citrus zest and marmalade for garnish.
